pre_merge_action: Close the C4 Draft PR and preserve all C4 evidence on its branch.
post_merge_action: Create a revert commit for only the C4 merge commit; do not rewrite history.
preserve: Draft PR #51 and all A4 failure evidence and workflow history

canonical data, runner, schema, HTML and fixture hashes
